subject: Fix OOM Clamp
commit_message:
Fix OOM Clamp

Fix the image name and SQL for mariadb as it has been updated

Issue-ID: CLAMP-467
Change-Id: I0bb9bf48b86a8eb3cc7a0f74dd5a5f20e46e8b44
Signed-off-by: sebdet <sebastien.determe@intl.att.com>

Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1

looks better (some clamps no more failed + CLAMP healthcheck OK) but still some issues with clamp elk pods
see https://orange-opensource.gitlab.io/lfn/onap/xtesting-onap-view/results/94286-3/k8s/onap-k8s.log

clamp-dash-es image not found => other pods are waiting for this pod to be up
=> change image for clamp-dashboard-elasticsearch-4.1.0 should fix the last errors.

Name:               onap-clamp-clamp-dash-es-db877757f-jj7ms
  Warning  Failed   7m58s (x2 over 23m)     kubelet, compute07-onap-gating  Failed to pull image "nexus3.onap.org:10001/onap/clamp-dashboard-elasticsearch:4.1-SNAPSHOT-latest": rpc error: code = Unknown desc = Error response from daemon: Get https://nexus3.onap.org:10001/v2/: net/http: request canceled (Client.Timeout exceeded while awaiting headers)

no stagging version allowed in master.
they should be retagged with a release version before being merged
